title: Flea Treatment in Highbridge, Bronx | $350-$650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Highbridge, Bronx. Effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Same-day service available. Call for a free quote!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Highbridge home? Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive flea treatment services throughout the Highbridge neighborhood, protecting your family and pets from these persistent pests. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of flea control in Bronx apartments and multi-family buildings.
whyUs: We've served Highbridge residents for years with proven flea elimination methods that work in both pre-war walk-ups and modern apartment complexes. Our treatments are pet-safe, highly effective, and backed by our satisfaction guarantee, with flexible scheduling to accommodate your busy lifestyle.
localContext: Highbridge's mix of historic residential buildings along Ogden Avenue and newer developments near Yankee Stadium creates diverse environments where fleas can thrive, especially in ground-floor units and buildings with shared courtyards. Our team is familiar with the area's building types, from the classic apartments near Highbridge Park to the multi-family homes along Jerome Avenue, ensuring targeted treatment for your specific situation.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Highbridge?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Highbridge typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your apartment or home, the severity of the infestation, and whether multiple rooms or units require treatment. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most flea treatments show results within 24-48 hours, with adult fleas dying quickly after application. However, complete elimination may take 2-3 weeks as eggs and pupae continue to hatch. We typically recommend a follow-up treatment after 14 days to ensure all life stages are eliminated.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, our flea treatments are specifically designed to be safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We use EPA-approved products and will provide specific instructions on when it's safe to re-enter treated areas, typically 2-4 hours after application once surfaces have dried.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Highbridge apartment during flea treatment?
faqs.answer: We recommend that people and pets vacate the apartment for 2-4 hours during and immediately after treatment. Our technicians will give you specific timing based on the treatment method used. You'll also receive preparation instructions, including vacuuming and washing pet bedding before our arrival.
